response:
<<A Yarn of Yawns and Yelps>>

*highlighted section*  
They yell about yokes, yet they yank at your yarn.  
You yearn for yield, but they yell your name again.  

*highlighted section*  
They yank your youth, yet they yield no yield.  
Your yoke is yours, yet they yank it yet.  

* * *  

*highlighted section*  
They yank your yield, yet they yell in your ear.  
Your year is yours, yet they yell it here.  

*highlighted section*  
They yell in your yard, yet they yield no yard.  
Your yawn is yours, yet they yell it hard.  

* * *  

*highlighted section*  
They yell your yield, yet they yield no yield.  
Your yoke is yours, yet they yell it real.  

*highlighted section*  
They yank your yarn, yet they yell your name.  
Your year is yours, yet they yell it same.
